title: parse_duration silently overflows on large values
description: src/config.rs:93: n * 86400 (and n * 3600, n * 60) are unchecked u64 multiplications. A config value like poll_interval = "213503982334602d" overflows to 0, and the interval() method returns Duration::from_secs(0), causing the feed poller to spin as fast as possible hammering the remote feed server. Fix: use n.checked_mul(86400).ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("duration overflow"))? for each multiplier.
close_reason: P0 fixes: AtomicU64, UTF-8 path, OsRng, 410 cleanup, constant-time key compare, checked_mul, SSRF guard, sanitized URLs, persona exists check, UTF-8 safe truncate
